nasb.text: Wail, O inhabitants of the Mortar, For all the people of Canaan will be silenced; All who weigh out silver will be cut off.

esv.text: Wail, O inhabitants of the Mortar! For all the traders are no more; all who weigh out silver are cut off.

cnv.text: 瑪革提施的居民哪！你們要哀號， 因為所有的商人都滅亡了； 所有稱銀子的都被剪除了。

ccb.text: 市场区的居民啊，哀哭吧！ 因为所有的商人必灭亡， 所有做买卖的必被铲除。
